refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time by optimizing load, travel, and dump operations to meet the customer-defined cycle time target under specified duty cycle and site conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; refining it into a focus on minimizing cycle time through the key operations clarifies the functional scope and enables targeted design solutions.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure cycle time p95 under representative duty cycles and site conditions, comparing against CT_target.

candidate_dps: DP1: Adaptive operation scheduling and coordination
DP2: Real-time cycle time monitoring and feedback control
DP3: Efficient vehicle subsystem design for load, travel, and dump
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Adaptive operation scheduling and coordination

potential_sources: Interdependence between load, travel, and dump operations requiring coordinated scheduling
Feedback loops from real-time monitoring influencing scheduling
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically decouples the cycle phases by scheduling but requires careful interface design to avoid tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate and timely telemetry data is available for scheduling decisions
Risk of scheduling conflicts or delays if communication latency is high
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating real-time monitoring DP2 as a subordinate DP to improve feedback control.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system coordination and scheduling of load, travel, and dump operations

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time vehicle and environment data for scheduling decisions

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends operation commands to Vehicle module to execute scheduled tasks

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication between NGHE Solution and Teleoperation or Safety Services modules

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as scheduling logic is centralized here; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle executes commands but does not contain scheduling logic; risk of diffusion if scheduling logic is duplicated.
Minimal containment; risk if teleoperation duplicates scheduling.
No containment; high diffusion risk if safety logic overlaps scheduling.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing scheduling DP in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential latency in communication interfaces impacting scheduling responsiveness
Risk of duplicated scheduling logic in Vehicle or Teleoperation modules if interfaces are not strictly enforced
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define strict interface contracts and monitor module boundaries to prevent diffusion.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Refined FRs are well matched by selected DP focusing on adaptive scheduling to optimize cycle time.

diffusion_risks: Possible duplication of scheduling logic in Vehicle or Teleoperation modules
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support centralizing DP in NGHE Solution module; interfaces are well defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and cycle time measurements is feasible at NGHE Solution level.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of scheduling DP to NGHE Solution module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Integrate real-time monitoring DP as subordinate to improve feedback control.
Strengthen interface contracts to prevent logic diffusion.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, integrating real-time monitoring DP and clarifying interface contracts will improve robustness and reduce risks.

revise.why: To incorporate real-time monitoring and feedback control as subordinate DP to adaptive scheduling.

assumptions: Telemetry data is accurate and timely
Communication latency is within acceptable limits
open_risks: Scheduling conflicts due to communication delays
evidence_needed: Telemetry data latency and accuracy metrics
